title: Automation Overload
description: ⚙️ Build massive factories and fully automate your world using Create, Mekanism, Refined Storage, and more in this high-tech 1.20.1 modpack.
body: Automation Overload is a high-tech modpack designed for Minecraft 1.20.1 forge that emphasizes factory-building, resource processing, and full automation. Dive into a world full of kinetic machines, and digital storage systems, nuclear power, and programmable infrastructure. Whether you're crafting sprawling industrial complexes or building compact automation units, this modpack has everything you need to build smarter and better.
